_doc: Mali-G610 GPU spec (Phase 1.2). Micro-benchmark (mali_matmul.json) is the primary source; analytic roofline is a SWAPPABLE slot for model-swap, giving shape-trend + a lower bound only (NOT transferable calibration; 5 points insufficient). HONESTY: the Phase 1.1 20.12 GFLOP/s point is FP16, NOT INT8; INT8 GPU GEMM has ZERO data (kernel is FP32/FP16 only). FP32 peak 512 GFLOP/s is an assumption that may UNDERESTIMATE by 2-4x.

notes.int8: ZERO INT8 GPU GEMM data; Mali matmul kernel is FP32/FP16 only.
notes.peak: FP32 512 GFLOP/s = assumption; may underestimate 2-4x; needs verification.
notes.roofline: shape-trend + absolute lower bound only; not transferable calibration.
notes.ksweep_saturation_M: DEAD param (kept, not deleted; annotated per audit).
